r46_prediction_test: P3 (POS-base → MODIFIER) — POS-base check ALIGNED. F3 (POS→NEG flip) requires SFT measurement, untested.
raw10_caveat: Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct is the only Phi-3-mini variant on HF (no separate base); treating it as BASE for R46 classification is convention not strict pretrain-only.
